include.description: List of repositories to include in the search context. Expected to be formatted as a URL without any leading http(s):// prefix (e.g., 'github.com/sourcebot-dev/sourcebot'). Glob patterns are supported.

includeConnections.description: List of connections to include in the search context.

exclude.description: List of repositories to exclude from the search context. Expected to be formatted as a URL without any leading http(s):// prefix (e.g., 'github.com/sourcebot-dev/sourcebot'). Glob patterns are supported.

excludeConnections.description: List of connections to exclude from the search context.

includeTopics.description: List of GitLab topics to include in the search context. Only repositories matching at least one topic are included. Glob patterns are supported.

excludeTopics.description: List of GitLab topics to exclude from the search context. Repositories matching any of these topics are excluded. Glob patterns are supported.

description.description: Optional description of the search context that surfaces in the UI.
